title: Energy without the crash
body: Three weeks in. The 3 PM dip is gone. Not jitters, just sustained. Worth the price.

title: Good — give it 4 weeks
body: Didn't feel much in week 1 or 2. Week 3 onwards, sleep is noticeably deeper. Will reorder.

title: The lab reports sold me
body: I've been burned by supplement labels before. Seeing actual third-party lab reports on every batch in the app — that's why I bought.

title: Cheaper than buying separately
body: Bought the combo because the math works out. Three months in, no colds despite a sick household.

title: Subtle but real
body: Two weeks of these and the brain fog I'd been ignoring just kind of… lifted. Hard to put my finger on what changed but something did.

title: The piperine makes the difference
body: Tried another turmeric brand for 2 months, nothing. These have piperine and I felt joint comfort within 10 days. Will not switch back.

title: Smart way to start
body: Didn't want to commit $60 to one bottle. The mini-trio at $19 let me figure out what worked for me. Now I subscribe to Alpha and Sea Moss.

title: Four months in, life-changing
body: Did the full 4-month protocol. Stress at work hasn't changed but my response to it has. That's what adaptogens are supposed to do and these actually do it.
